name: Chapati (Phulka)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the whole wheat flour in a large bowl and add half the water.
2. Mix together until it holds together.
3. Knead well until a smooth, elastic dough forms.
4. Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
5. Divide the dough into 4 to 6 parts.
6. Roll each part into a tortilla-like flat, about 1/8 inch thick.
7. Heat an ungreased skillet.
8. Place the phulka on the skillet and cook for about 1 minute until the top starts to look dry and small bubbles form.
9. Turn and cook the second side for 2/3 minutes until more small bubbles form.
10. Lightly press with a towel and turn again, cooking the first side until it puffs.
11. Serve warm (optionally slightly buttered).
